name: SQL - DQ - No Sales District by Source

content.query:
SELECT
l.[OperatingCompany]
,EOMONTH(l.[EntryDate]) as EntryMonth
,l.[LP_LeadSourceID]
,l.[LP_LeadSubSourceID]
,l.[LP_DispositionID]
,l.[Sold]
,ss.Description as SubSourceDescription
,ss.Active as SubSourceActive
,count(l.[LeadID]) as LeadCount
,sum(l.[GrossSalesAmount]) as GrossSalesAmount
 FROM 
 [EDW].[FACT_LEAD] l
,[EDW].[DIM_LEAD_SUB_SOURCE] ss
 where 
 l.SalesDistrictID is null
 and l.LeadSubSourceID = ss.LeadSubSourceID
 group BY
 l.[OperatingCompany]
,EOMONTH(l.[EntryDate])
,l.[LP_LeadSourceID]
,l.[LP_LeadSubSourceID]
,l.[LP_DispositionID]
,l.[Sold]
,ss.Description
,ss.Active
order by
LeadCount desc
